name: Appliance Assembly Basic Equipment Pack
description: Factory-capable home appliance final assembly pack for a strict two-floor workshop building with roof, mezzanine production areas, conveyor lines, kitting, foaming, testing, aging, packaging, palletizing, controls, and utility equipment.

factoryArchitectures.label: Appliance assembly two-floor final assembly architecture

notes: Generate a visible two-floor workshop shell first, including walls, second-floor slab intent, roof, doors, and window bands.
Keep the final assembly conveyor on level 1 as the main long axis.
Place kitting, door liner subassembly, light storage, and aging racks on level 2, feeding the line through the vertical lift conveyor.
Keep controls and utilities along the side wall or mezzanine edge.

stations.label: Two-floor workshop shell
stations.equipmentHint: appliance_assembly.two_floor_workshop_shell two-floor appliance assembly workshop building with main walls, second-floor slab, roof, loading doors, window bands, roof vents, and parapet

stations.label: Parts kitting station
stations.equipmentHint: appliance_assembly.parts_kitting_station mezzanine parts kitting station with workbench, bins, tool rail, and pick light display

stations.label: Mezzanine storage rack
stations.equipmentHint: appliance_assembly.mezzanine_storage_rack tall light storage rack on upper floor with multiple shelf levels, bins, and aisle label

stations.label: Door liner assembly station
stations.equipmentHint: appliance_assembly.door_liner_assembly_station appliance door and liner subassembly bench with fixture plate, clamp blocks, tool rail, and operator panel

stations.label: Vertical lift conveyor
stations.equipmentHint: appliance_assembly.vertical_lift_conveyor vertical lift conveyor connecting mezzanine and level 1 with tower frame, belt platform, guard fence, and drive motor

stations.label: Sheet metal buffer
stations.equipmentHint: appliance_assembly.sheet_metal_buffer cabinet sheet metal buffer rack with tower frame, vertical panel slots, and warning label

stations.label: Cabinet foaming press
stations.equipmentHint: appliance_assembly.cabinet_foaming_press refrigerator cabinet foaming press with large press body, platens, service door, hydraulic panel, and stack light

stations.label: Curing buffer conveyor
stations.equipmentHint: appliance_assembly.curing_buffer_conveyor long curing buffer conveyor with frame, belt surface, side guards, and repeated pallet stops

stations.label: Final assembly conveyor
stations.equipmentHint: appliance_assembly.final_assembly_conveyor long appliance final assembly conveyor with frame, roller bed, belt surface, side guards, drive motor, and pallet fixtures

stations.label: Screw fastening station
stations.equipmentHint: appliance_assembly.screw_fastening_station screw fastening workstation with bench, suspended tool rail, operator HMI, torque display, and andon light

stations.label: Leak test station
stations.equipmentHint: appliance_assembly.leak_test_station appliance leak test station with enclosed frame, clamp plate, gauge display, pneumatic manifold, and reject chute

stations.label: Functional test bench
stations.equipmentHint: appliance_assembly.functional_test_bench functional test bench with instrument display, cable tray, power sockets, control panel, and status tower

stations.label: Aging burn-in rack
stations.equipmentHint: appliance_assembly.aging_burn_in_rack high-bay aging and burn-in rack with multi-level frame, electrical cabinet, cable tray, warning labels, and pallet loads

stations.label: Vision inspection gate
stations.equipmentHint: appliance_assembly.vision_inspection_gate gantry vision inspection gate with tower frame, camera light panels, display, and side reject chute

stations.label: Carton packaging station
stations.equipmentHint: appliance_assembly.carton_packaging_station appliance carton packaging station with conveyor, carton sealer body, tape head, strapping arch, and control box

stations.label: Palletizing robot cell
stations.equipmentHint: appliance_assembly.palletizing_robot_cell robot palletizing cell with orange robot arm, pallet table, infeed conveyor, guard fence, and warning label

stations.label: Material cart
stations.equipmentHint: appliance_assembly.material_cart wheeled material cart with low platform, bins, push handle, four wheels, and status label

stations.label: Mezzanine control room
stations.equipmentHint: appliance_assembly.mezzanine_control_room small occupied mezzanine control room with building shell, roof parapet, door, windows, HMI panel, and cable entry

stations.label: Line control cabinet
stations.equipmentHint: appliance_assembly.line_control_cabinet line PLC and drive cabinet row with electrical cabinet body, HMI display, cable tray, warning labels, and status light

stations.label: Utility air skid
stations.equipmentHint: appliance_assembly.utility_air_skid compressed air utility skid with compressor body, motor, inlet outlet ports, manifold, and control box
